name: Clear Storage Case with Hinged Doors - Brightroom™
description:
Create an elegant display while organizing essentials with the Clear Storage Case with Hinged Doors from Brightroom™. This storage case features multiple shelves to help keep the perfume, makeup, hair accessories and more nicely organized. Made with plastic, this clear storage case makes a practical addition to your space, and easily opens and closes with hinged doors.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
